analysis.object: T413: Yang-Mills Dual 2-3 Attack Strategy depth analysis

eml2_cluster.description: EML-2 tools: lattice QCD, perturbation theory, asymptotic freedom

eml3_cluster.description: EML-3 tools: instantons, theta-vacuum, Wightman axioms

alternation.description: Hybrid strategy: alternate between EML-2 and EML-3 tools

eml2_for_gap.description: Use EML-2 tropical minimum to establish gap existence

eml3_for_mass.description: Use EML-3 Wightman axioms to control mass spectrum

dual_blueprint.description: T413: YM proof requires alternating {EML-2 gap existence} + {EML-3 mass spectrum control}
